text: The video shows the heart inside the pericardium on the left side of the surgical field, with small incisions visible as part of the elegant surgical approach.
The surgeon uses a robotic instrument to divide the pulmonary vein leading to the upper lobe of the lung, demonstrating precise control in a confined surgical space.
The robotic stapler is used to seal and divide a vessel, demonstrating its dual function in the surgical field.
The surgeon prepares to address the airway to the upper lobe, focusing on the bronchus as the next step in the procedure.
The surgeon uses the robotic stapler to safely seal and divide the airway to the upper lobe, demonstrating the precision and dexterity of the instrument.
The surgeon uses a robotic stapler to divide the bronchus, completing the separation of the airway to the upper lobe.
The surgeon places the excised thymus specimen into a specialized retrieval bag, completing the thymectomy procedure.
